title: SHARPAL 129N Multipurpose Pocket Knife Sharpener and Garden Tool Sharpener, Sharpening Secateurs, Shears, Loppers, Axe, Pruner, Scissors, Lawnmower Blade

Sharpening and Honing Instruction 1.Align the cutting edge being sharpened and the sharpening tool at an angle of approximately 20 degrees. 2.Maintain the angle and repeatedly slide the tungsten carbide along the cutting edge from the heel of the blade toward the tip. Continue this motion until the desired sharpness is achieved. 3.Switch to the ceramic blade for honing the cutting edge, , following the same process as sharpening. Multipurpose Garden Tool Blade Sharpener Restore and hone all sorts of pruners, knives, lawn mower blade, garden shears, garden tools edge, etc. Versatile Sharpener: From Garden Tools to Razor-Sharp Knives: Tungsten carbide blades effectively sharpen most garden tools, as they don't require a very sharp edge. For knives and tools requiring a razor-sharp finish, ceramic blades are essential to achieve the desired sharpness. This sharpener caters to a variety of sharpening needs, making it a versatile tool for your garden and kitchen. Comparison with traditional garden tool sharpener Two-stage for precision sharpening More Durable Finer Edge Finish Better Workmanship Never Wears out Traditional garden tool sharpeners Traditional garden tool blade sharpeners with only a single tungsten carbide blade cannot achieve fine honing. Key Feature Durable Tungsten Carbide Blade Quickly sharpen and repair dull or damaged edge Pure Ceramic Blade Finely hone, polish and remove burrs Portable design with pen clip The innovative design, featuring a pen clip on the cap, ensures the product is securely held in place when stored in a pocket. Built-in lanyard hole Ergonomic and comfortable grip handle with lanyard hole.
